textByHash.3f129201d100ea122df3313c369f4b834fe98520: Hello there, I'm busy with my research. Come back in a bit, could you?
textByHash.ba5e7ea3e6d3c50443c0de8dbb67b3bcb062065e: Hello there and welcome to my humble abode. It's sadly rather more humble than I'd like, to be honest, although perhaps you can help with that?
textByHash.703fda68a16594b7864746ac9c362dbed58bff4d: Yay, I didn't even have to talk about a reward; you're more gullible than most adventurers, that's for sure.
textByHash.e177134c8483fa491e9429e7f8d60e9c4d60b5db: Don't worry, though; I just need you to help fix this vile old bed for me. Then I'll find a suitable reward for you.
textByHash.834dd05b5c69fe5b8f5c2da09cb7cb13cca0947a: Don't be silly; everyone knows that true warriors don't ever sleep...or perform many other bodily functions, for that matter. I'll come up with something, though.
textByHash.c864cef444a8c0de4099b31d6cea45f8910c51b3: What I need is simple: a couple of undead chickens. You should be able to pick some up at the farm near Port Phasmatys.
textByHash.78867b51f18dd8e36b19ef651f3676d07ee8fa72: Very well, I suppose I'll just have to resort to the Professor's patented sleeping aid in order to get some rest. It does so bruise my head, though.
textByHash.7b70fa8501f1b3abbd96de0f214b11bea881795d: I'm not a nice girl. I'm a respectable scientist researching the interactions between ghosts and the force of pure science.
textByHash.028da0235cd6eca0f0a3a41bd1410b97d27c6561: I took over the position of assistant the the Professor upstairs, although, to be honest, his methods are somewhat eccentric. Did you head about the Ernest scandal?
textByHash.e1e0ba70436e134f520c5d05dc8285d9273bc2d6: You don't know the half of it - can you believe that he thinks he has proven Goldbach's First Conjecture using an optimised segmented sieve?
textByHash.4a0c00e67be8c916f3bad39c784b9fa4f043b727: Do you need a reminder what you are supposed to do? I know you must have shiny beads distracting you, but it is an important job you are doing for me.
textByHash.b57ca5848396c54a1a3c3eeac7816c917e315352: ...And people say we scientists are absent minded...
textByHash.aeee7ac608119b6484b898b39469f785ea4247b9: You need to fetch 2 undead chickens for me to use in my redecoration. It's not rocket science.
textByHash.2d9d2cc78e9c26fd76f7feb6cf7de478e897196d: If they existed, they would be like arrows but much, much bigger. Considering the mess you rangers make with small bits of stick, we scientists have decided they don't exist. Now get chicken hunting.
textByHash.d192fef8c83ba4fd873ba48d0b8eb8e3387c60b8: Well, the Witch next door has been cooking some rather nice gingerbread, but I don't think that counts as gossip.
textByHash.f1d929842abde011af7c319b622a875d26fd3682: Can you head off and do adventurous stuff, please? I hear the Wilderness is fun this time of year.
textByHash.7857675d5719c5932311ec6557da33b78d39e71c: What are you doing? I'm not ticklish.
textByHash.ee3391d7575015ed8fbce6c998c67c0f8083cf1b: What are you doing? Yuck, dead things.
textByHash.d8927ad62776f0362808a54676be1e6c63a497ea: What are you doing? Do I look that thin?
textByHash.57637ee70c591556d839022d886e2db40718a6f8: What are you doing? Trying to infect me with some vile disease?
textByHash.ffc38a910b4ba536338004b893a2004e3266264c: I'm not sure what you are trying to do, are you sure you aren't slightly deranged?
textByHash.421798d8b71de4088da9a343d1e0a215061686af: My spiritometric devices show that you have been in close contact with ghostly animals. Are we closer to success?
textByHash.31547dc7891530d2b88b50162d383e6dad707e92: Amazing! Success! I can look forward to some good nights' sleep after all.
textByHash.557430a72975cc12447e797d42bf6e99f2ba621f: Well, I need the feathers to make my bed more comfortable. A comfortable bed will help me sleep. Obvious, really.
textByHash.04e88f04fcda42a4abfdb0c81846bf4541fe58e9: Well, for a start, undead feathers are much cleaner than living ones; no dust mites or anything. Secondly, I always think of Ernest when I see a chicken, so my nerves can't take killing them.
textByHash.230a4e98c746b180073d3edffa8fda71197170cd: Seeing as how you ranger types use so many feathers in your arrows, I was thinking I could harness an undead chicken to make an unending supply of arrow flights for you.
textByHash.48bf8fdb9209a1007917fcde52031214e0b31e0f: We'll need a magnet next, one with purely natural fields and made from a carefully selected iron bar. A firm impact when the iron is parallel to Gielinor's field will stabilise this field in the rod.
textByHash.4b9b440e7a923585cafcf009d0e608b8fa0d79e7: Go and talk to the Witch next door.
textByHash.df453ef7117b06a06d36facd14501aac917cbe72: Stunning. I should have tried to hire some gnomes instead. They may be obsessed with their bellies but they can at least be trusted to deliver unpleasant perishables.
textByHash.bcf24172219de220c406b2b038e5aa60758f6b6c: Are you going to hand it over or do you want to continue to waft it about menacingly?
textByHash.24e0225f81e271f32cae4f591e196d541a662ee0: You would be more menacing if your weapon weren't quite so rotten.
textByHash.09c4fb37988b0f896c80cd7bc469d931da153a35: On second thought, the way you wave it about makes me fear for my life. Stow it in your back and talk to me again.
textByHash.5fbf59522234120a8203a55fa4bf0028d05ea887: Thanks! This is great for me, although I'll need another one if you want any sort of reward.
textByHash.d384a54dfc29df0ad55230dbab4000fdd8167d6d: Why do you come back with no chickens? I'll be needing another one before I give you your reward! I'm not going to relent, even if you say 'plz plz plz' and claim you were just scammed.
textByHash.7027f126843bcbae498ff6d5641255394512773e: Go and talk to the Witch next door. She'd talk the hid legs off a donkey but she can select the iron with which is suitable for the chicken to interact.
textByHash.67f03ffdfeb3f930236978fe7cc8caeed938e897: Despite my extensive studies, her years of experience make her better at instinctive magico-mystical interaction. Oh well, at least I'm cleverer, prettier and will have a better bed.
textByHash.8bdb01c1c86600a945f301e4f18f5d75bde3b599: Do I resemble an iron-bar merchant?
textByHash.0f6a340a7bca1186c9beea82105614b278286d8a: An entirely logical answer; you'll make a scientiest yet.
textByHash.be4f459ccb62bf15c6cb2f7b92ca22c2cffe4419: I'm thrilled for you. What about my magnet?
textByHash.0eb203577ddc8509ce7fee76d034387a309fc8e3: I can see now why Fenkenstain prefers to work with dead folk. It can't be more frustrating than working with you.
textByHash.71f63c58b2a4e501acd2fa492b45d4b7de612638: Great stuff! With the Witch's influence within the magnet, the undead chicken can use this, I'm sure.
textByHash.cbbfc061f8bdbdae49b0d674019294f8e32230b2: The plan is that the chicken will operate the magnet to attract bits of iron and steel, maybe even your own recently fired arrows. There are plenty of totally lost arrowheads lying about in the fields of Gielinor, I bet.
textByHash.5888e664f5c756bdacbc3877d6f414ba8cd8cbeb: In addition, arrows which you fire should be able to be attracted back to your quiver by the cunning avian.
textByHash.8302a6b9083a97be3f95b16d7ff5ecb80ac66185: We need a source of wood, but one which is spiritually active and can regenerate itself. That will save you some axework in the future.
textByHash.b522fe3510408bbd1764509cedfaaeee2b6264e4: Try using a woodcutting axe on the pesky trees in the garden here, the ones that attack rather than the really dead ones. They are probably just the sort of thing we could use.
textByHash.2d535e2f047311cba7e7126853bb0b3e7f487c35: Now you know how those poor guards feel when you hide behind mushrooms and fences and attack them from afar! Anyway, I reckon you'll need to try a mithril or better axe on the trees. At least the trees are
textByHash.f038b5d73490c147f794ad6ac5799ffb3cae87a8: So, what terrible hitch have you encountered now?
textByHash.e90b44bdbec1bccd89c4432e01cbe13f88e85e91: Well, I've heard that all kinds of dragons and even basilisks can drop mithril axes, if that's why you are delaying. Most of these creatures are silly enough that you can even hide behind something and plink them to
textByHash.ed36a3f1a771537e8d304cd55265b28abeb4b677: death in the brave ranger way.
textByHash.c7c64a034626b11b753b3fb6975d73dbc5af2d20: Fortunately for you, I've done some research and it seems to suggest that there are two choices open to you.
textByHash.8db5e230f8b63c24cc85435f91e31685613618af: The first is more interesting. We cut off your arms, have them reanimated as undead, reattach them and then you should be able to cut the trees normally.
textByHash.687ce70d81c094259ce335cc7a675e5f300621ca: Of course, you won't be able to pick your nose anymore, so I suppose you'll want to try the second option.
textByHash.a9ce4a34edac60ae915b74142efa2fbe35d430c4: Well, in that case, I think it may have something to do with Slayer abilities. After all, I did see Turael poking around the trees while I was moving in.
textByHash.20d75213212ca9ef7596f63608219980b82d242d: Well, in that case, I think it may have something to do with Slayer abilities. After all, I did see Aya poking around the trees while I was moving in.
textByHash.c0ed0de73684e9e3070875fb6bae7af2b4704f26: As he's not known for his random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Turael. He's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.f622814a79b6e64547a0606544d9fbbbf2e4df63: As she's not known for his random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Turael. He's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.6384ea80d8a52117a43ecbc0581c5857069b48dc: As he's not known for her random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Turael. He's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.35c7c0605f8d032951df0f5f26d4aab1e553ea0c: As she's not known for her random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Turael. He's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.d98954ee0c82c397f689b0aecb9a90d0d2f80dce: As he's not known for his random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Aya. He's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.1e69dd7f04097281e269726f54e0ea03476a9585: As she's not known for his random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Aya. He's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.59c658c8f00630d713453314e9364ffc0779c72c: As he's not known for her random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Aya. He's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.0dbc33e50c1fee12671edfefedab3dc677c02ee9: As she's not known for her random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Aya. He's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.b09179483984b0e8a499dcbfca9dcb365b41c838: As he's not known for his random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Turael. She's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.d14be0d9462a91e52492aa856278d0b603493016: As she's not known for his random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Turael. She's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.e4d71d1e81011b5c8761c447794dfb0f6b974fc2: As he's not known for her random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Turael. She's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.d584b0ddedd0f9918ca082a08678876a732515f9: As she's not known for her random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Turael. She's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.54cde93c94a85df35e11b63fff3fd26f2b6a1e4e: As he's not known for his random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Aya. She's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.bdb2aa3282a6ac5edc90b10dc6030287ab49c1c7: As she's not known for his random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Aya. She's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.96c781d0eaafbb3eae8903319ad0db306a86ead2: As he's not known for her random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Aya. She's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.28d1e9677e8c26dae9d8e4b1363d92b2f57ade54: As she's not known for her random touristic activities, you should try chatting with this Aya. She's the Slayer Master near Burthorpe.
textByHash.166a8ba5ac5c4dbf9583dbfc570b6eda2e3b0965: A pity; you'd look quite cute with rabbit ears. Perhaps I should have bribed him.
textByHash.eb7f9afdd49aada16929e243a91442722457ce47: A pity; you'd look quite cute with rabbit ears. Perhaps I should have bribed her.
textByHash.8af39b9fbf0f80a16e73ccfdeccf176154f75c2f: What do you want? A prize? Go and get the wood; it's not as if the trees are wandering about and hard to find.
textByHash.11dc1d8f3a7e8d124dc8f46a27a3dba145a477fd: Quite. Now that we have all the ingredients for infinite arrows, we just need a container in which we can keep the components in the correct mutual alignment.
textByHash.9cdd77583923d5cfdd5991f0b55b92e48565eb29: I've gathered together some research notes from various sources but I can't quite make out what they mean. If you want to have a go at making them out, just ask me for a copy.
textByHash.7f6bb9221191cafb6fded8198041e33699b23fd7: They are still stumping me. Here are the notes; I really hope your head doesn't explode from reading them.
textByHash.ade13e9c5d1e73aaa69bf2913be9689be42f0387: It wouldn't be all bad as your body would be useful for research after death. What I'd be upset about was if bits of you landed in my nice new bed.
textByHash.84f7842e30ec0ece8fc02fdc215d274debef1da3: Don't tell me, your cat ate them? You won't get out of the job that easily; here are some copies I made.
textByHash.e9a9c47b20ce1916af3a05efd441e489a794ba7a: I know you have the notes; I gave them to you, in case you forgot. Furthermore, if I had hints, I'd have translated those notes myself.
textByHash.84a0b99b3c9e9551f394df4e5b042219215e33b1: So, take the hint and go off and translate them. If it's too hard, you can always go and shoot demons in cages.
textByHash.dfeed95bcfc1cf216aa3df6d60cf00a134f18441: For all I know, it was pure luck, so don't jump to any conclusions about your mighty intellect.
textByHash.5025935755d9746a19539722c5800d4facf1514d: Let's get back to the work we're doing, then. Remember, this is all a favour to you; I could have just decided to fob you off with a feather duster.
textByHash.da3cfea2335e3d28b2cc6503b4359dd4ebdd48bf: I've given you a pattern for the container; you'll need to combine them with some polished buttons and hard leather. Then we're almost done. Good news, eh?
textByHash.0f273905ce60f68b95f096dcb53c9ed93c292726: If you are having trouble finding buttons, I've heard rumours that the H.A.M. society carry this sort of stuff more than most.
textByHash.f035fb102cf91af50daf20f5c3846410eab11b6f: I hear they lose their clothes a lot to thieves so they have to make do with shoddy goods. Whatever the reason, they seem to carry buttons about in their pockets.
textByHash.0d40138794c1e77a1d0f25d39c0ea73de58d637b: Your short-term memory loss worries me. Combine the pattern with hard leather and some polished buttons, then hand the resulting container to me.
textByHash.a919acc88a107c0158e1b07d4976409a0391d836: You're pretty careless, aren't you? I assume you're the type who leaves a trail of arrows and knives behind them when they train?
textByHash.a988dd314b1c0b594576fa3da98466dbdd652cff: Here's a replacement; perhaps if I charged for them, you'd be more careful.
textByHash.3e9b95c6509e1d5336dae8aaf02e948a0ed748ee: You've made the container, I assume?
textByHash.dbadfca68d373ef85e3122cac5ee1cb2f139e26e: It's only the final, vital step in your quest that you decided to leave who-knows-where. Don't worry, I have plenty of spares.
textByHash.e84f56f4f58cc6be86bdff426ecfaa6af882097f: You've made one container; surely you can make another. Is it killing a cow or spotting those bright pink H.A.M. members that you are having troubles with?
textByHash.d94a4bc54e79f7ac571579e89885b93bbf762e7b: Wow, great, now the arrow manufacturer is ready for use...there you are! Talk to me if you need more information later.
textByHash.8f063576fe5779f57c97602f638fee791e6349b7: You are also skilled enough that I'm rewarding you with the upgraded version right away. Congratulations.
textByHash.f79470a38c0e52deff61d3afd5e3e6dd8f3f6e39: Hello again. Are you after another device, or some information, or would you like to see my goods for sale?
textByHash.14665e07bb3ab2437b737d087d511140ccc41ed0: You were thinking that because I made you a metal attracting device before that I'd be able to do it again.
textByHash.fe7e91b6777113e2450eb2b764723dacf568e5c7: Should be doable. Will need to be quite different to your device though. Much greater distance and a different type of metal. You said it was red, right?
textByHash.ee7be7f0d8bf44ea868e7050d15f973e19da8d02: Must be orikalkum. Dragon as you adventuring lot call it. Quite rare. Should make things easier. Now let me think about this... If we just... hmm... yes... perfect!
textByHash.caecc02b2fdf1410afabdbc2c4e29691c7db5c7d: Go get one cut dragonstone and two molten glass. Use a glassblowing pipe to craft a glass orb with the dragonstone in the centre. Once you have it, bring it to me. Any questions? Good. Bye.
textByHash.52a018e1985b72c9480f3c373f9a1dc2cd7b66b1: Have you crafted that orb yet?
textByHash.7a9718cc3367b3ae4f3c90b498ad6dde06863f91: You adventurers are so forgetful. You'll need one cut dragonstone and two molten glass. Use a glassblowing pipe to craft a glass orb with the dragonstone in the centre. When you're done, bring it back here.
textByHash.4e40aff99de1dcd94b93fb4e61b48b828d8f1c2a: Excellent. Now just a few small adjustments and...
textByHash.5eb7d5fa223eacba8da33108c072737d00afce68: Here you go. You can use this to track down that key piece of yours.
textByHash.34fbc92c5e555abc1c80eab3829373a6d0e0ced5: The orb will pull you in the direction of the key piece, but be careful with it. It's a little unstable.
textByHash.2066a98735206fdf8e9de79e895ca54e74b60bc0: Nothing to get worried about. It might just sting a bit when you use it.
textByHash.d7906b73e5a81eed6a96eebc962c41a5349b4700: If I could upgrade that device of yours?
textByHash.1497080e370f1f0723e1ddffc300d7be1f649e91: Hmm... Might be possible. The chicken is the weakness at the moment. If you find something with a bit more kick, I might be able to upgrade it further.
textByHash.ab7c9304e908a5add4f3d5d6648dcb602b9e827e: Yes. Something a bit stronger. A bit more undead.
textByHash.60b467a4ded8c847127f7e95471cc67697dd1c34: I already made you a locator orb. What else do you need?
textByHash.46ffad92d7386d73f01251bd2b415ccaeda591be: Well luckily for you, I made a spare. Please try to look after this one.
textByHash.92922858896a773c5af46c876305f01441f7b0a3: I'm not alone! Me and my mates run these streets. You'd better watch your pockets, stranger.
textByHash.47f5e1341d3ff3ddcb50e582f25540539ca38b99: We keep a lookout to see when the owners leave and come back. Once they're out, we can break in and steal all their stuff!
textByHash.5bf5774f7425ea09b281c1d9e84e33c6ed896971: No one suspects us street urchins. Hidden in plain sight, as they say.
textByHash.b0da03835f16f8676f09c28443b089968ab09922: I can give you some info on which houses are free if you like...
textByHash.0d4681afc6de5b2e518d64a893472bddc92d8a59: You're new around here. Normally I'd charge 15 valuables for information, but I'm feeling generous.
textByHash.74bc013ccc8fb37b21e24b0a180d768c810b8ade: Looks like isn't home right now. Go quickly!
textByHash.75d2d2011a5116ac8e3975baedabf5253988b398: Do you want me to point you in the right direction?
textByHash.c9477ad77e1f220a5f5412d10425656282850453: His house is south of here.
textByHash.3c50b2d618912db0d79fe9890ef76cd4733580c2: Hello. Have you met our crew leader yet?
textByHash.ff543ae9baa1b5ed09f1a35becef47540fc23bf5: Go chat to them! They should be near the bank... naturally.
textByHash.1932c2b578040c15623ed55f2b0f30d94ecb399c: You don't have any house keys, do you? You won't find yourself getting very far without any. Maybe come back later?
textByHash.75963da6750dd90dc2e57d0c5bb7429540b7d17d: Just a few bits of information before you run away to persecute rock crabs or cows.
textByHash.8cb80d6110041dd31f0f4404f79a796b96ec98c9: Firstly, your new device won't work if you are wearing certain metallic chest armours.
textByHash.4e38965f995d183615526037475eea572f6aef64: The magnetic attraction required for operation would cause feedback, so the device does not allow such incompatible item equip page.
textByHash.a62c045e1604c6de3ea333718b22cb910634bc7a: Secondly, although the device is calibrated to attract only arrow heads, there is a chance that other magnetically active items will be attracted.
textByHash.dd2eb8ff4dff195357e94d73b2297625eff4471a: The arrow recovery function of the devices is slightly different and relies upon a harmonic bond between your arrows and the chicken's magnet. You'll thus only recover arrows which you have fired rather than those
textByHash.c9835e34fbee9d2072086ddf8e81fdbf48baee57: You'll also need to move about if you want to collect arrows since the gathering of long-lost arrowheads can't work otherwise.
textByHash.fca39ad6eb86a0d9d0bdcf85cca51eb600d79eaa: Finally, the device will only work when worn. It automatically deactivates in other circumstances.
textByHash.87cb32c9945a947142ec54cd2d717b1781b12163: I was worried about what would happen if you were to place it in a bank in its active state, so I've made sure it only works when it's on your back.
textByHash.8683ffb5c187748ccdcdda423db4c8053a969994: Thanks for the help with my bed; see you again.
textByHash.148c02f5cba73b7163993c6f72e88b262a412642: That truly is a remarkable piece of equipment.
textByHash.729ac870cad280aee62a6c048f1b3f00fcbd2e2b: Bring me one of my devices. I might be able to link the two!
textByHash.333d882579399caba4c3ac0f45b2aeb39db894cd: If you've got the materials, I can make one now for you?
textByHash.e6bcace5af57ae3a8ef0e5d3613fb51fe128b35b: That quiver has some of the finest leatherwork I've ever seen!
textByHash.e4a459c1b7a3c61a2992c812af4ac8c8796d5302: Better? Let me see... I might be able to do something.
textByHash.4587efd964c09f40807868c65623b69e967408fc: I'll see if I can link it to the device you have with you.
textByHash.53f08df9a0b812d1063bfa782651c218f3038ee2: There we go! That's some of my finest work, if I do say so myself.
textByHash.bd192817e53757d8d4ac603571d636277051a2c5: Looks like that quiver could be modified further. Come back to me with another device to modify it.
textByHash.b3377f97f61621f67f89c449978f4b29f070548a: Hmm, interesting... It seems to lack the power you have in your other device there.
textByHash.b8c06af84a47848456e9e08e710a29df17bb7d05: I'll give it a good go!
textByHash.4074da8ff43b3a2b99910e509b506877c6e7dcb1: It seems like that quiver is as good as it's going to get!
textByHash.1eb889252261f1eb9a400fed1529f2cbde2f7b8b: I'm not sure what you are trying to do; are you sure you aren't slightly deranged?
